## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no functional change
- [ ] chore — build, deps, CI

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally with `docker compose up`

- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guide (ruff for Python, ESLint for TypeScript)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] `content/` and `.env` are not included in this PR
